identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.description: A high-end virtual dressing room that feels like a futuristic fashion studio, not a generic SaaS dashboard. Dark, mysterious, but hyper-functional.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-secondary font-medium tracking-tight leading-none
scale.caption: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-500
scale.label: text-sm font-primary font-semibold tracking-wide

layout_strategies.marketing_hero: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[80vh] relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-none px-8 py-3 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-primary_hover transition-all relative overflow-hidden
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white rounded-none px-8 py-3 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest hover:border-white transition-all

cards.outfit: group relative aspect-[3/4] bg-zinc-900 overflow-hidden border border-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-600 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-zinc-700 focus:border-primary outline-none py-2 text-white placeholder-zinc-600 transition-colors rounded-none

models.alt: Female model in white dress studio

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS FIRST: Run 'npm install @fontsource/playfair-display @fontsource/manrope @fontsource/jetbrains-mono' and import them in index.js/App.js.
THEME SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js to use the provided color palette. Extend the theme, do not overwrite default Tailwind colors unless necessary. Use CSS variables for flexibility.
LAYOUT: Implement the 'Dashboard' layout as the shell. The Sidebar should be minimal (icon-only or thin).
DRESSING ROOM: This is the core. Use the 'dressing_room' grid layout. Left panel = Character Select. Right panel = Outfit Select. Center = Canvas.
COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn components for logic (Select, Dialog, Tabs) but OVERRIDE their styles to match the 'E1' aesthetic (sharp corners, glass backgrounds, no default white backgrounds).
IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs for initial data population. Do not leave empty states.
ANIMATIONS: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and layout changes (e.g., when an outfit is applied).
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
